mentions.note: CEO Shchuts outlines 2026 comeback: precision immunology (degrader platform targeting IgA nephropathy, Graves' disease, 80M-person indication); obesity (T-alpha preserves muscle vs GLP-1s, phase 3 reading out 2026); epilepsy (KV7 activators without side effects). Transformation story after 2025 trial failures; capital raised upsized, Janus Henderson took 10%.
